class.name: sparo_navigation_core::DoorPlanController
class.description: Control doors based on current Nav2 plan and door definitions

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::PublishDoorYaml
class.description: Publish a door YAML path to trigger door configuration reload

class.name: elevator_bt::CallElevatorToFloor
class.description: Call the elevator to a requested floor via ElevatorClient

class.name: elevator_bt::GetCabinGoal
class.description: Load elevator YAML and compute the cabin goal pose/target for elevator operations

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::SelectNearestElevator
class.description: Select the nearest elevator using TF/cabin_z and write the choice to blackboard

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::SetElevatorDoor
class.description: Open/close the elevator door using ElevatorClient

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitDoorOpen
class.description: Wait until the elevator door reaches the desired open/close state

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitCabinAtTarget
class.description: Wait until the elevator cabin z matches the target floor height within tolerance

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitFloorCommand
class.description: Wait for a floor request command from a topic

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitRobotNearElevator
class.description: Wait until the robot is within the elevator-front zone defined in elevator YAML.

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitRobotInsideCabin
class.description: Wait until the robot is inside the elevator cabin zone defined in elevator YAML.

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::WaitRobotOutsideElevator
class.description: Wait until the robot is outside the elevator area/zone defined in elevator YAML.

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::AlignWithStairs
class.description: Rotate in place to align the robot yaw with the stairs entry yaw defined in the stair YAML

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::CheckFloorDifferent
class.description: Compare current_floor and target_floor, output floors_to_climb and direction

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::ClimbFlightRL
class.description: Climb one stair flight using cmd_vel while monitoring TF z change with tolerance and optional timeout

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::ComputeNextFloor
class.description: Compute next_floor from current_floor and direction

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::GetCurrentFloor
class.description: Estimate current floor index from TF z using floor z thresholds and output current_floor.

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::GetTargetFloorFromTopic
class.description: Subscribe to a floor request topic and output target_floor when a message arrives

class.name: sparo_navigation_core::MoveForwardDistance
class.description: Drive forward by a given distance using cmd_vel while tracking odom_frame→base_frame TF
